message:
feat(engine): interop specimens, npm native-addon posture, PIC config, and tests

esm_cjs_interop_parity:
- Add scoped-package and extensionless-relative interop specimens for
  both native and compat modes — tests fail-closed resolution behavior
  when extensionless relative imports are used in type=module packages

npm_compatibility_matrix:
- New NativeAddonMode enum (None/Optional/Required) tracking whether
  packages depend on native addons
- capability_safe_membrane_fallback field on NpmPackageEntry for
  packages that can degrade gracefully through the membrane
- Both fields flow through to report output and failure routing

frankenctl + franken_npm_compatibility_matrix:
- Add optional report_path to compile/receipt/benchmark verification
  output structs for artifact traceability
- Wire native_addon_mode and capability_safe_membrane_fallback through
  package outcome records and unresolved failure routing

parser:
- Refactor await expression parsing to use let-chain syntax (combining
  strip_prefix + condition into a single if-let-and expression)

polymorphic_inline_cache:
- record_access() now takes &IcPolicyConfig parameter, using
  config.max_poly_entries instead of hardcoded DEFAULT_MAX_POLY_ENTRIES
  for the polymorphic→megamorphic transition threshold
- All call sites and tests updated to pass config

Tests:
- New interop parity integration tests for scoped-package specimens
- New npm compatibility matrix CLI tests for native-addon fields
- Expanded enrichment integration tests
- PIC tests updated for config-parameterized record_access
- Versioned rewrite pack and saga orchestrator enrichment tests expanded

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

@@ -3469,6 +3573,33 @@ mod tests {
         );
     }
 
+    #[test]
+    fn canonicalize_scoped_package_specimen_rewrites_relative_dependency_targets() {
+        let sm = SpecimenModule {
+            specifier: "@scope/pkg.js".into(),
+            syntax: ModuleSyntax::EsModule,
+            source: "import { value } from './sub'; export { value } from './sub';".into(),
+            imports: vec![ImportEntry::new("./sub", "value", "value")],
+            exports: vec![ExportEntry::re_export("value", "./sub", "value")],
+            has_default_export: false,
+            has_top_level_await: false,
+        };
+        let canonical_targets = BTreeMap::from([(
+            ("@scope/pkg.js".to_string(), "./sub".to_string()),
+            "@scope/pkg/sub.mjs".to_string(),
+        )]);
+
+        let canonicalized = canonicalize_specimen_module(&sm, &canonical_targets);
+        assert_eq!(
+            canonicalized.imports[0].module_request,
+            "@scope/pkg/sub.mjs"
+        );
+        assert_eq!(
+            canonicalized.exports[0].module_request.as_deref(),
+            Some("@scope/pkg/sub.mjs")
+        );
+    }
+

@@ -3532,6 +3663,71 @@ mod tests {

+    #[test]
+    fn run_single_specimen_scoped_extensionless_relative_mode_split_matches_resolver_contract() {
+        let corpus = interop_parity_corpus();
+
+        let native = corpus
+            .iter()
+            .find(|specimen| {
+                specimen.specimen_id == "scoped_package_type_module_extensionless_relative_native"
+            })
+            .unwrap();
+        let native_evidence = run_single_specimen(native);
+        assert_eq!(
+            native_evidence.compatibility_mode,
+            CompatibilityMode::Native
+        );
+        assert_eq!(
+            native_evidence.actual_outcome,
+            InteropActualOutcome::LinkFailure
+        );
+        assert_eq!(native_evidence.verdict, InteropVerdict::Pass);
+
+        let node_compat = corpus
+            .iter()
+            .find(|specimen| {
+                specimen.specimen_id
+                    == "scoped_package_type_module_extensionless_relative_node_compat"
+            })
+            .unwrap();
+        let node_compat_evidence = run_single_specimen(node_compat);
+        assert_eq!(
+            node_compat_evidence.compatibility_mode,
+            CompatibilityMode::NodeCompat
+        );
+        assert_eq!(
+            node_compat_evidence.actual_outcome,
+            InteropActualOutcome::LinkFailure
+        );
+        assert_eq!(node_compat_evidence.verdict, InteropVerdict::Pass);
+
+        let bun_compat = corpus
+            .iter()
+            .find(|specimen| {
+                specimen.specimen_id
+                    == "scoped_package_type_module_extensionless_relative_bun_compat"
+            })
+            .unwrap();
+        let bun_compat_evidence = run_single_specimen(bun_compat);
+        assert_eq!(
+            bun_compat_evidence.compatibility_mode,
+            CompatibilityMode::BunCompat
+        );
+        assert_eq!(
+            bun_compat_evidence.actual_outcome,
+            InteropActualOutcome::Success
+        );
+        assert_eq!(bun_compat_evidence.verdict, InteropVerdict::Pass);
+        assert_eq!(bun_compat_evidence.linked_count, 2);
+        assert!(
+            bun_compat_evidence
+                .binding_verdicts
+                .iter()
+                .all(|verdict| verdict.pass)
+        );
+    }
+
